Title: Head of Design
Description: Taking ownership for the design area, making design a strategic part of the business. Fostering creative culture in the product team and the company, focusing on collaboration and fun across the all roles and disciplines. Managing a small design team.

Title: Lead Product Designer
Description: Coming soon. I have to figure it out first.

Title: Product Designer
Description: Learnifier är en flexibel plattform för skapande av egna utbildningar. Som produktdesigner ansvarar jag  för prototypa och testa ny funktionalitet, producera all design och framför allt att ständigt förbättra och optimera kundupplevelsen av plattformen. Workshops, kundintervjuer och Sketch är mina viktigaste verktyg.

Title: Teacher in UX and Design Thinking
Description: This fall (2020) I'm teaching 40 happy and digitally distanced students the secrets of UX and Design Thinking. I'm doing this together with my friend and teacher colleague Erik Lindahl. Great fun.  Read more at: https://nackademin.se/utbildningar/anvandarcentrerad-design-inom-ux/

Title: Product & UX designer
Description: As Product Designer I worked closely with the tech team using SCRUM and User Story Mapping as our agile methods. I was the voice of our Users, collecting their wants and needs by interviews, chat conversations, workshops, questionaries and analytics. I created and tested prototypes and made all graphic assets for the application.

Title: Art Director, UX Designer
Description: I worked in the fluid area between UX and UI, creating wireframes, prototypes and final graphics. As a consultant I worked with many different companies and size of projects. I helped Klarna competitor AfterPay app with positioning concepts and ux/ ui design for their app. Another interesting project was onboarding wizard for Swedbank. My role was to find the precise amount of information user needed to make a well grounded decision, to make it fun but also functional and educational. More clients: Blocket, Regeringskansliet, Försvaret, Scania, TLV

Title: Visual Designer
Description: We offer services to help our clients reach the expected effects of their product investments. We view user experience and usability as an important mean to achieve expected benefits for the procurer as well as users.  - And I help to make it look good.

Title: Freelance Graphic Designer
Description: I´m looking for freedom (and some new projects).

Title: Grafisk Formgivare
Description: Liten reklambyrå på Söder. Kärnan i företaget är liten, men runt den finns ett kreativt och tänkande kollektiv bestående av designers, projektledare, copywriters och art directors. Bland kunderna finns Fiber Optic Valley, Hufvudstaden AB, Affärsområdet Biblioteksgatan och Fazer. Och det bästa är att Leo (min korthåriga Collie) också fått jobb här som kontorets maskot.

Title: Freelance Graphic Designer
Description: Samarbete med designbyrån SuperHype. Design och produktion av marknadsföringsmaterial för Bridge Ltd och Ventelo.

Title: Event Project Manager
Description: Projektledare för ett seminarium om internets framtid. Evenemanget går av stapeln den 1:a november kl 13-17 och platsen är Debaser Medis. För mer info och anmälan se http://www.daytona.se/.

Title: Graphic Designer
Description: Ansvarig för bild-, textmaterial, layout och utgivning av kundtidningen Videotoppen.

Title: Graphic Designer
Description: Skisser, detaljdesign och jobbade tätt med Art Directors. Kunder som Skandiabanken, Skandia fonder och Eriksson.
